mapper.insert: insert into batch.dead_letter_task ( tenant_id, source_type, source_id, dead_letter_reason, payload_ref, replay_status, replay_count, last_replay_at, last_replay_result, trace_id, max_replay_count, next_replay_at, error_class ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{deadLetterReason}, #{payloadRef}, #{replayStatus}, #{replayCount}, #{lastReplayAt}, #{lastReplayResult}, #{traceId}, coalesce(#{maxReplayCount}, 3), #{nextReplayAt}, coalesce(#{errorClass}, 'SYSTEM') )
mapper.update: update batch.dead_letter_task set replay_status = #{successStatus}, replay_count = #{replayCount}, last_replay_at = #{lastReplayAt}, last_replay_result = #{lastReplayResult}, next_replay_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}

update batch.dead_letter_task set replay_status = #{targetStatus}, replay_count = #{replayCount}, last_replay_at = #{lastReplayAt}, last_replay_result = #{lastReplayResult}, next_replay_at = #{nextReplayAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from batch.dead_letter_task where replay_status in ('NEW', 'FAILED') and error_class = 'SYSTEM' and next_replay_at is not null and next_replay_at <= current_timestamp and replay_count < max_replay_count order by next_replay_at asc, id asc limit #{batchSize}
